parameters.query: SELECT pm.*, pm.title_en, pm.description_en, im.quantity, im.purchase_price, im.status as inv_status FROM products_master pm JOIN inventory_master im ON pm.id = im.product_id WHERE pm.id = $1

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ product_id: $json.product_id, account: $json.account, listing_mode: $json.listing_mode, product_data: $json.product, scheduled_at: $json.scheduled_at }) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO listing_execution_logs (product_id, marketplace, account, listing_mode, success, listing_id, error_message, executed_at) VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, $7, NOW()) RETURNING log_id
